
title: "Quick Start Guide for robustMDAS"
author: "Mohammed Mundher Thakir"
date: "r Sys.Date()"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
%\VignetteIndexEntry{Quick Start Guide}
%\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
%\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}

{r
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
library(robustMDAS)
Basic Usage
{r
# Generate synthetic data
set.seed(456)
data <- simulate_clinical_data(n = 300, task = "sepsis")
data <- preprocess_clinical_data(data)

# Create train-test split
n_total <- nrow(data)
n_train <- floor(0.8 * n_total)
train_idx <- sample(n_total, n_train)

X_train <- data[train_idx, -ncol(data)]
X_test <- data[-train_idx, -ncol(data)]

# Run diagnostic
result <- robust_diagnostic(X_train, X_test, n_replications = 50)

# Print results
cat("P-value:", result$p_combined, "\n")
cat("Decision:", ifelse(result$reject_null, "INADEQUATE", "ADEQUATE"), "\n")
